name: xero-mcp-server
description: Xero accounting integration over MCP with PKCE auth, multi-organisation support, and macOS Keychain credential storage.
long_description: Provides MCP tools for Xero: list/create/update/delete invoices, contacts, items, bills, manual journals, payroll timesheets, tracking categories, and more. Reads accounts, payments, tax rates, balance sheet, P&L, trial balance, aged receivables/payables. Switch between Xero organisations the OAuth grant has access to via the list-organisations and set-active-organisation tools. Re-authenticate at any time with the re-authenticate tool. Tokens are stored in the macOS Keychain by default; HTTPS callback uses mkcert (if installed) or a self-signed cert.

client_id.title: Xero Client ID
client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Xero developer app (https://developer.xero.com/app/manage). The app must have https://localhost:8765/callback registered as a redirect URI.

client_secret.title: Xero Client Secret
client_secret.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Xero developer app.
